mechanism_narrative: Lower federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and discount rates, directly boosting equity valuations over the next month.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.02 over any 3-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns show no statistical significance during rate cuts.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp rise in unemployment signals deteriorating labor market conditions and weakening consumer demand, causing equity prices to decline over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Forward returns are positive in > 55% of triggered instances, or the signal loses predictive power during expansion phases.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous increases in retail sales and housing starts indicate synchronized consumer spending and construction activity, driving positive market returns.
failure_condition: Joint signal shows no predictive power (IC < 0.01) compared to individual series in out-of-sample testing.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production during a tightening cycle reflects resilient supply-side capacity that absorbs higher rates, supporting short-term equity gains.
failure_condition: Signal direction reverses or becomes statistically insignificant during tightening periods across multiple cycles.

mechanism_narrative: Higher real GDP growth directly increases corporate earnings expectations, generating positive forward returns over a quarterly horizon.
failure_condition: 60-day forward returns show negative correlation with GDP growth across multiple expansion phases, or Rank IC < 0.03.

mechanism_narrative: Accelerating inflation triggers expectations of aggressive central bank tightening, compressing equity valuations within one month.
failure_condition: Market returns remain positive in > 60% of high-inflation trigger months, or the signal fails to predict drawdowns.

mechanism_narrative: Rising nonfarm payrolls combined with falling unemployment rates confirm robust labor market tightening, boosting consumer confidence and equity prices.
failure_condition: The combined signal fails to outperform single-series models in out-of-sample testing, or IC drops below 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Declining retail sales during a late-cycle expansion signal peak consumer exhaustion, leading to immediate negative equity repricing.
failure_condition: Short-term returns remain positive despite retail sales declines in late-cycle environments, or signal accuracy falls below 45%.
